_comments.purpose: Deterministic Agent — AI model configuration for reliable, repeatable outputs
_comments.temperature: Set to 0.0 for maximum determinism. Never increase above 0.1 for this play.
_comments.top_p: 1.0 with temperature=0 gives fully deterministic sampling
_comments.seed: Fixed seed (42) ensures reproducibility across runs. Change only if A/B testing.
_comments.max_tokens: 500 tokens is sufficient for structured JSON responses. Increase for longer outputs.
_comments.response_format: Strict JSON schema forces the model to output valid, structured data every time. The schema defines: answer, confidence, citations, verified.
